da.company_info:
Hot Yoga Copenhagen ApS
CVR: 41295252 · VAT: DK41295252
Torvegade 66, 1400 København K, Danmark
Telefon: +45 53 88 12 09 · E-mail: info@yogabible.dk
da.subbrands: Underbrands: Yoga Bible, Hot Yoga Copenhagen, Vibro Yoga, Namaste Studios, Namaste Online, Yoga Bible International.
da.s1_text: Disse betingelser gælder for alle køb, deltagelse og brug af services på tværs af websites, e-mails og platforme. Både B2C (forbruger) og B2B (erhverv) er dækket.
da.s2_text: Standardvaluta er DKK. Bestillingen er bindende, når bekræftelse er modtaget. Afdragsordninger kan inkludere forsinkelsesgebyr (ca. 150 kr.). Certificering udstedes typisk ved fuld betaling.
da.s3_courses: Kurser: Fuld refusion ved aflysning 30+ dage før start; ingen refusion ved <30 dage
da.s3_illness: Sygdom: Generelt ingen refusion, men overflytning til fremtidigt hold kan aftales
da.s4_text: Forbrugere har ca. 14 dages fortrydelsesret ved fjernsalg. Øjeblikkelig servicelevering kan betyde, at fortrydelsesretten bortfalder.
da.s5_physical: Fysisk træning i Danmark: 25% moms fra 1. januar 2026
da.s5_education: Uddannelsesprogrammer kan kvalificere til momsfritagelse under specifikke betingelser
da.s5_international: Internationale B2C virtuelle services kan have moms i kundens land
da.s6_text: Depositum er ikke-refunderbart. Der kræves 90+ dages skriftlig opsigelse for at undgå fuld betalingsforpligtelse. Certificering udstedes ved komplet betaling. Fuld refusion hvis organisationen aflyser.
da.s7_text: 48+ timers varsel kræves for ombooking. Under 48 timer: Fuld betaling tilbageholdes, ingen refusion.
da.s8_text: Øjeblikkelig adgang ved køb. Live-only sessioner inkluderer typisk ikke optagelser. Deltagere accepterer potentiel synlighed i livestreams.
da.s9_text: Organisationen kan optage deltagere til undervisning, dokumentation og markedsføring. Deltagere kan anmode om kamerafri placering (24 timers varsel foretrukket). Fuld udelukkelse kan ikke garanteres i gruppesettings.
da.s10_text: Materialer tilhører Yoga Bible / Hot Yoga Copenhagen ApS. Forbudte aktiviteter: kopiering, deling, optagelse, fotografering eller kommerciel brug uden skriftlig tilladelse. Overtrædelser medfører øjeblikkelig udelukkelse uden refusion.
da.s11_text: Yoga indebærer skaderisiko. Deltagere påtager sig ansvar og skal følge instruktioner. Undervisning erstatter ikke lægelig vurdering.
da.s12_text: Professionelt læringsmiljø. Chikane, diskrimination, trusler eller sikkerhedsovertrædelser kan medføre ophør og udelukkelse.
da.s13_text: 24-måneders non-solicitation periode efter arbejdsforhold ophører. Streng fortrolighed vedrørende elevdata, processer, priser og materialer. Al kundekontakt håndteres gennem officielle kanaler.
da.s14_text: Kontakt info@yogabible.dk ved tvister. Dansk lovgivning gælder; værneting er Københavns Byret. Betingelser kan opdateres; den version der var gældende ved køb, er styrende.

en.company_info:
Hot Yoga Copenhagen ApS
CVR: 41295252 · VAT: DK41295252
Torvegade 66, 1400 København K, Denmark
Phone: +45 53 88 12 09 · Email: info@yogabible.dk
en.subbrands: Sub-brands: Yoga Bible, Hot Yoga Copenhagen, Vibro Yoga, Namaste Studios, Namaste Online, Yoga Bible International.
en.s1_text: These terms apply to all purchases, participation, and use of services across websites, emails, and platforms. Both B2C (consumer) and B2B (business) are covered.
en.s2_text: Default currency is DKK. The order is binding once confirmation is received. Installment plans may include a late fee (approx. 150 DKK). Certification is typically issued upon full payment.
en.s3_courses: Courses: Full refund if cancelled 30+ days before start; no refund at <30 days
en.s3_workshops: Workshops: 59 DKK no-show fee; booking/credits are consumed
en.s3_illness: Illness: Generally no refund, but transfer to a future cohort may be arranged
en.s3_org_cancel: Full refund if the organization cancels
en.s4_text: Consumers have approximately 14 days right of withdrawal for distance sales. Immediate service delivery may mean the right of withdrawal lapses.
en.s5_physical: Physical training in Denmark: 25% VAT from January 1, 2026
en.s5_education: Training programs may qualify for VAT exemption under specific conditions
en.s5_international: International B2C virtual services may be subject to VAT in the customer's country
en.s6_text: Deposits are non-refundable. 90+ days written notice is required to avoid full payment obligation. Certification is issued upon complete payment. Full refund if the organization cancels.
en.s7_text: 48+ hours notice is required for rebooking. Less than 48 hours: Full payment is retained, no refund.
en.s8_text: Immediate access upon purchase. Live-only sessions typically do not include recordings. Participants accept potential visibility in livestreams.
en.s9_text: The organization may record participants for teaching, documentation, and marketing purposes. Participants can request camera-free placement (24 hours notice preferred). Full exclusion cannot be guaranteed in group settings.
en.s10_text: Materials belong to Yoga Bible / Hot Yoga Copenhagen ApS. Prohibited activities: copying, sharing, recording, photographing, or commercial use without written permission. Violations result in immediate exclusion without refund.
en.s11_text: Yoga involves risk of injury. Participants assume responsibility and must follow instructions. Teaching does not replace medical assessment.
en.s12_text: Professional learning environment. Harassment, discrimination, threats, or safety violations may result in termination and exclusion.
en.s13_text: 24-month non-solicitation period after the working relationship ends. Strict confidentiality regarding student data, processes, pricing, and materials. All client contact is handled through official channels.
en.s14_text: Contact info@yogabible.dk for disputes. Danish law applies; venue is the Copenhagen City Court. Terms may be updated; the version in effect at the time of purchase governs.
